productDisplayName: Puma Women Cell Varex SL White Sports Shoes
description: When you're a busy women on the go, you want a shoe that can transition as quickly as you can. The puma Cell Varex has everything you'll need to train and looks good when teamed with casual wear. Upper Air mesh upper offers excellent breathability Synthetic leather overlays provide added midfoot support Padded tongue and collar for extremely snug Fit Central lacing for a snug, customised fit Outsole embedded onto the toe box for better shock absorption Midsole Molded EVA sockliner offers superior cushioning and support EVA and TPR heel unit offers the ultimate cushioning EVA in the forefoot provides you with added cushion during training Outsole EverTrack rubber composite outsole supplies optimal durability in high-wear areas ArchTech technology in the design of this pair offers you the necessary support required to sprint
